notes: Paths point at the user's converted CC-licensed Sketchfab meshes promoted from the conversion cache into the workspace models folder. These files are not redistributed with the repo; when a path is missing the pipeline falls back to the procedural glasses mesh.

templates.notes: Heavy rectangular full-rim glTF glasses. Cleanest shape of the converted set.
Same bold full-rim mesh; reads sporty via the outline bake and auto color.
Round wire-frame glasses; its lens surfaces are opaque so the solid bake fills them. Demoted until a lens-free round mesh exists — round faces fall through to the full-rim template.
Thin wrap band; kept for comparison, rims break up at small scales.
